# MDE v1.4.2

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed Markdown editor saves so intentional consecutive blank lines in the document body are preserved after saving and reopening.
- Preserved blank lines without rewriting fenced code block contents.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit coverage for blank-line marker conversion and empty paragraph export.
- Added integration coverage for real BlockNote import/export blank-line round trips.
- Added E2E coverage for saving and reopening Markdown with consecutive blank lines.

## Documentation and User Manual

- Updated the zh-CN editor manual to document that consecutive body blank lines are preserved across save and reopen.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions should publish the macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.4.2`.
- Repository signing/notarization secrets could not be inspected locally because the current GitHub token does not have Actions secrets read permission; release signing behavior will follow the repository's configured secrets.
